title: Eurowrap Pink Glitter Tissue Paper - 6 Sheets
features: 6 sheets of 50x70cm to let your imagination run wild and create the most creative packaging possible!

Tissue paper is the essential asset to bring a touch of originality to your gift wrapping. Crumpled in a cardboard box, folded in a bag or cut to form a rose and give volume, it will embellish all your packages.
Multi use for all occassions - such as birthdays, anniversaries, weddings, Christmas, Easter and any other occasions.
